name: Chicken in Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken in half lengthwise.
2. Blend the butter and mustard together to make a paste.
3. Rub the paste onto the inside and outside of the chicken pieces.
4. Place the chicken, skin side down, in a baking dish with a tight-fitting cover.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. In a small bowl, combine the orange juice and brown sugar. Stir until the sugar is completely dissolved.
7. Pour the orange juice mixture over and around the chicken in the baking dish.
8. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
9. Remove the foil, turn the chicken over, and baste it with pan juices. Continue to bake, uncovered, for an additional 20 minutes, basting occasionally.
10. Transfer the chicken to a heated platter and keep warm.
11. In a small bowl, mix the cornstarch with water to make a slurry.
12. Strain the pan juices through a fine-mesh sieve into another bowl.
13. Stir in the vodka until combined.
14. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
15. Remove from heat and pour the sauce over the chicken.
